login.subtitle: Sign in to access IT Support
login.needHelp: Need help? Contact your IT administrator
login.validation.bothRequired: Please enter both username and password
login.msg.failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.branding.title: Enterprise Service Desk

profile.title: Account Settings
password.title: Change Password
password.validation.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
password.validation.minLength8: Password must be at least 8 characters
forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.msg.checkEmail: If an account exists with that email address, we've sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.msg.invalidToken: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.msg.success: Your password has been reset successfully. You will be redirected to the login page.
resetPassword.msg.failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
